featuredSentence: It's time for the pet show!

pages.narrativeCN: Hello Hello, my dear friend！I am Amy! How are you？...... I'm good！Good！今天我们要讲Biscuit Wins a Prize的故事！Are you ready？Let's go！
呀，小女孩叫着Biscuit说：Here, Biscuit! 快看，Biscuit！It's time for the pet show！Time for就是该做什么了，pet show就是宠物秀、宠物表演！原来Biscuit要和他的小主人一起去参加宠物表演啦！你猜猜看，他会表演什么呢？
pages.narrativeEN: Here, Biscuit. It's time for the pet show! Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 小女孩告诉Biscuit，pet show上会有好多好多pets，pets就是小宠物！而且呀，还会有prizes，prizes就是奖品呢！她说：Come along, sweet puppy. 快过来，我的小甜心！我们要打扮得漂漂亮亮，展现出最棒的一面去参加比赛！是不是很期待呀？
pages.narrativeEN: There will be lots of pets, and prizes, too! Woof, woof! Come along, sweet puppy. You want to look your best. Woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 看，小女孩正在给Biscuit梳毛呢，想让他变得美美的！可是Biscuit好像不太听话，扭来扭去的。小女孩说：Hold still, Biscuit! Hold still就是“别动，站好”的意思。哈哈，Biscuit真是个funny puppy，funny就是有趣的、好笑的！他是不是有点调皮呀？
pages.narrativeEN: Hold still, Biscuit. Woof, woof! Funny puppy! Don't tug now! 7221 Hold still, Biscuit. Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 哎呀，Biscuit又在干嘛呢？小女孩惊呼：“Oh, Biscuit! It's not time to roll over！” Roll over就是打滚的意思。哈哈，Biscuit又在地上打滚了！小女孩着急地说，现在不是打滚的时候呀，我们要去pet show啦！你觉得Biscuit是想玩吗？
pages.narrativeEN: Oh, Biscuit! It's not time to roll over. Woof, woof! It's time for the pet show!

pages.narrativeCN: 他们终于来到宠物表演的现场啦！哇，好多好多小宠物呀！Look at all the pets，看这些小动物！Biscuit看到了谁呢？原来他看到了自己的friend，friend就是朋友！他的好朋友Puddles也来啦！它们开心地打招呼，Bow wow！
pages.narrativeEN: Look at all the pets, Biscuit. Woof, woof! Biscuit sees his friend Puddles. Bow wow! Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 走着走着，Biscuit又看到了谁呀？哈哈，他又看到了另一个friend，他的好朋友Sam也来了！Ruff！大家都好开心呀！Biscuit是不是很喜欢跟朋友们在一起呀？你也有很多好朋友吗？
pages.narrativeEN: Biscuit sees his friend Sam. Ruff! Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 除了老朋友，Biscuit还看到了好多new friends，new friends就是新朋友！大家都聚在一起，真热闹呀！Biscuit是不是很喜欢交朋友呀？你喜欢认识新朋友吗？
pages.narrativeEN: Biscuit sees lots of new friends, too. Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 哎呀，大家都要站好啦！小女孩说：“Hold still now, Biscuit. Here comes the judge！” Judge就是裁判员，要来评选啦！可是Biscuit又跑掉了，小女孩着急地说：“Oh no, Biscuit. Come back！” Come back就是快回来！Biscuit跑去哪儿了呢？
pages.narrativeEN: Hold still now, Biscuit. Here comes the judge. Woof! Oh no, Biscuit. Come back!

pages.narrativeCN: Biscuit跑去干嘛了呢？原来他想去看看那些小fish，fish就是小鱼，他还在笼子外面探头探脑，想看看那些bunnies，bunnies就是小兔子！哈哈，他是不是对什么都很好奇呀？
pages.narrativeEN: Biscuit wants to see the fish. Woof! Biscuit wants to see the bunnies. Woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 哈哈，原来Biscuit是想看看pet show里all of the pets，all of the pets就是所有的小宠物！他太喜欢小动物了，忍不住东看看西瞧瞧，是不是跟你一样呀？他是不是想和所有的小动物都成为朋友呢？
pages.narrativeEN: Woof, woof! Biscuit wants to see all of the pets at the pet show!

pages.narrativeCN: 小女孩终于找到Biscuit啦！她抱着Biscuit，觉得他真是个silly puppy，silly就是有点傻傻的，可爱的意思！她摸着Biscuit说：“你猜猜看，你会赢得什么prize呢？” Prize就是奖品！你觉得Biscuit会得什么奖呢？
pages.narrativeEN: Silly puppy! Here you are. What prize will you win now? Woof, woof!

pages.narrativeCN: 哇，快看！Biscuit真的得奖了！他得了什么奖呢？哈哈，他得到了一枚大大的“FRIEND”奖牌！FRIEND就是朋友！小女孩开心地说，这是the best prize of all，就是所有奖品里最好的！因为Biscuit真是个爱交朋友的好狗狗呀！
pages.narrativeEN: FRIEND Oh, Biscuit! You won the best prize of all! Woof! FRIEND

pages.narrativeCN: 今天的故事讲完啦！Biscuit Wins a Prize真是太有趣了！你学会了哪些新单词呀？我们明天再见哦！

sentences.text: There will be lots of pets, and prizes, too!
